meaning: adj.印度斯坦的,印度斯坦人的n.印度斯坦语,(讲印度语支的)印度人
examples: "She sang a Hindustani song to me and it made me go to sleep," said Colin.
The founders of modern India wanted Hindustani to unite the country.
For Bhimsen Joshi was really interpreting Hindustani music in his own way.
He loved the syncreticism of Hindustani music, with its mixture of Hindu and Muslim influences.
